one_time_description: Prior period adjustment: $648,126 previously expensed payment to Kanaskiy Services Ltd. (50% owned by Creeland Resources Inc.) reclassified as investment in Creeland Resources Inc.
economic_notes: Three controlled entities: Wapsewsepi Enterprises Ltd., Creeland Resources Inc., 18805424 Alberta Ltd. accounted for by modified equity method. Large Agricultural Benefits Trust Fund with RBC Wealth Management totaling $35.6M in investments. Trust funds held in Ottawa Trust Accounts under Indian Act.
notes: Fiscal year is 2021, not 2024. Annual surplus on Statement of Change in Net Financial Assets shows $6,081,556 (includes trust fund unrealized gains) while Statement of Financial Activities shows $1,503,087 excess of revenue over expenditures — the larger figure reflects trust fund investment gains (unrealized gains of $5,142,167 in Agricultural Benefits Trust). Prior period restatement of $648,126 reclassifying Kanaskiy Services Ltd. payment from expense to investment. Three entities (Wapsewsepi Enterprises Ltd., Creeland Resources Inc., 18805424 Alberta Ltd.) accounted for by modified equity method rather than full consolidation. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements. expenses_education includes School ($2,339,651) and Post-Secondary Education ($540,419). expenses_housing includes CMHC Housing ($134) and CMHC Multi-plex ($47,846) and Housing ($1,599,103).
